feature_bullets: 𝐄𝐧𝐣𝐨𝐲 𝐅𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐡, 𝐅𝐢𝐥𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐝 & 𝐂𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐧 𝐁𝐚𝐭𝐡 𝐖𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫: Crystal Quest’s innovative bath water filter effectively reduces or removes additives or man made chemicals including but not limited to chlorine, chloramine and their byptoducts, providing a rejuvenating and enjoyable bathing experience. It reduces contaminants, ensuring clean & pH balanced water for a refreshing and soothing bath.

𝐀𝐟𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐝𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 & 𝐄𝐟𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭: This tap water filter is a cost-effective solution with 2,500 gallons of filtration lifespan* before requiring replacement. It offers long-lasting protection against harmful impurities, making it an excellent investment for any home.

𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐓𝐨 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐥: This innovative bath water filter is effortless to install and requires no additional tools or equipment. It can fit seamlessly onto most standard bathtub faucets, making it a convenient addition to any bathroom. Includes two types of handles (standard & flexible) to accommodate various faucet designs.

𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐲 𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐥𝐞: Our bathtub filter offers a seamless and versatile solution to remove impurities from the bathwater. It fits most tubs but is not universal and cleans water at any temperature for a year-round rejuvenating and pure bath experience. Kindly check whether the product is compatible with you tub or not before buying. If it does not fit after you have purchased it please return it to us and get apply for price back.

top_reviews.title: A+++++ bath filter
top_reviews.body: Put this filter on our water cabin system....took away the smell and yellow from lake water..feeling soft and clean...Awesome....

top_reviews.title: Can visually see the difference in the colour of the ...
top_reviews.body: Can visually see the difference in the colour of the water, and there is 0 smell of clorine now.

top_reviews.title: Works but fits awkward
top_reviews.body: Our town has days where the water is brown colored due to higher rust…. Its gross, i bought this to better filter out the water to bathe my baby. It makes a noticeable difference but hooking it up to the tap to get to stay has been tricky. I have to stuck a face cloth underneath to help it from sliding off.

top_reviews.title: Does nothing
top_reviews.body: Does nothing and doesnt stay on curved faucet

top_reviews.title: Seems to work
top_reviews.body: I can't tell 100% if this works or not, but the water seems softer.  I don't know if it'll last as long as it claims though.

top_reviews.title: My wife noticed less hair loss and better skin. However the filter screen is not dense ...
top_reviews.body: The bath ball does filter chlorine and substances that comes through the tap. My wife noticed less hair loss and better skin. However the filter screen is not dense enough resulting the carbon inside dropping into the bath water. Wife stopped using it because too much carbon coming out.

top_reviews.title: High recommended!
top_reviews.body: This bath filter is a game-changer. It was incredibly easy to install and works exactly as advertised. I immediately noticed a difference in the water—it feels much cleaner and "softer" on the skin. If you're dealing with hard water or chlorine smells, I highly recommend this!

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on April 7, 2026

top_reviews.title: Replacement filters a problem
top_reviews.body: Its meant to be one of the best filters to get and it is good BUT it takes a very long time to arrive - its shipped from the US but worse than that, there don't seem to be any replacement filters on sale in the UK. You can order them direct from Crystal Quest in the States but that makes the filters prohibitively expensive and huge delays on delivery....v annoying to find this out after I've purchased the bath filter!!

date.raw: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on April 14, 2025

top_reviews.title: 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 Game-Changer for Sensitive Skin – Noticeably Softer Water After One Use!
top_reviews.body: I didn’t expect to love this bath filter as much as I do — but it made a noticeable difference after just one bath! Living in an area with hard, heavily chlorinated water, my skin always felt dry and itchy after bathing, no matter what products I used. This filter changed that instantly.💧 Skin Feels Softer & Less IrritatedAfter using this for one week, my skin feels smoother and less tight after every bath. I no longer need to slather on thick lotion right away. My daughter also has sensitive skin, and I’ve noticed fewer flare-ups since using this product. That alone made it worth every penny.💡 Easy to Use & AttachThe setup couldn’t be simpler — just hang it under your tub spout and let the water run through it. No complicated installation or tools. It even fits our slightly curved spout just fine.🛁 Water Smells & Feels CleanerThere’s no more heavy chlorine smell, and the water feels silkier somehow. It’s hard to describe, but you can literally feel the difference — like hotel-quality bath water at home.♻️ Eco-Friendly & BPA-FreeI love that it’s BPA-free and built to filter out harmful contaminants without compromising water flow. The design is also sleek and modern — it doesn’t look bulky or awkward in our tub.⸻Final Thoughts:I didn’t realize how much my bath water was affecting my skin until I tried this. I highly recommend it to anyone with skin issues, kids, or simply looking to upgrade their self-care routine at home.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on May 30, 2025

top_reviews.title: Clean water
top_reviews.body: Amazing works just as described wow clean refreshing water

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on April 8, 2026

top_reviews.title: Mold!
top_reviews.body: I was super happy with our Crystal Quest Bath Ball filter until I went to change the filter and found mold! This was our second filter change, so we've had it for about 12 months. We didn't notice any mold at the 6-month filter change. When I reached out to the company directly, I was told "The bath ball is removing the chlorine in the water so if left in an area that is a suitable environment (Humidity, temperature, etc.), bacteria can form since there is no chlorine to prevent it.You can use hydrogen peroxide or bleach to disinfect it, then I would recommend making sure the outside and inside of the housing is dried off after each use."The directive to make sure the outside and inside of the housing are dried off after each use was not in the original manual. When I asked the company to honor the limited warranty, they told me that any exchange/replacement would have to be from Amazon... well it has been almost a year so that's a no-go.We will not be purchasing from this company again, this product is too expensive to be missing care instructions and the company does not care to honor their warranty.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on January 16, 2025
